name: xdm_final_parity_gate_overlay
description: Certifies critical and high parity, qualifies migration fixtures and unknown-length downloads, enforces modern-only source and solution policy, and adds Linux/Windows package smoke CI.
commitMessage: Complete the modern XDM final parity gate
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms or MSIX targets
Require 100 percent critical and high-priority parity
Require repository-local implementation and test evidence
Require zero warnings and zero errors
